summary: Comprehensive backend + mobile UI testing of the Emergency Cremation & Funeral Planner (v2). 23/23 backend tests pass (checklist religion branching, invalid-number checks, OTP mock, vault _id/base64 hiding, share i18n). Mobile UI verified end-to-end on 375x667 viewport — landing copy, 3-step setup with unexpected-death branch, 5-phase checklist (14 tasks for muslim+home+unexpected), task detail with urgency box + Mark done / Not for us buttons, contacts hub with 8 verified national numbers + local search cards, settings (EN/HI/TA), and 'Continue where I left off' session persistence all work.

issues: Progress framing is gentle in initial state ('14 things to look at, a few at a time') but reverts to 'X done · Y skipped · Z left' once any task is marked — arguably still counter-y. Not a blocker but E1 may want fully gentle framing throughout.

react_native_issues.issue: React Native Web deprecation warning: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' emitted from theme.shadow.card. Non-breaking on web but should migrate to boxShadow / react-native's new shadow API. Reference: /app/frontend/src/theme.ts (shadow.card) and any consumers (checklist FAB, quick bar).

Console warning: '[expo-notifications] Listening to push token changes is not yet fully supported on web.' Reminder setup registers a token listener that no-ops on web — safe on native but noisy; consider guarding with Platform.OS !== 'web'.

action_items: (Optional) Extend 'gentle framing' progress text to also cover the in-progress state on /checklist instead of 'X done · Y skipped · Z left'.
(Optional) Migrate theme.shadow.* to boxShadow or Platform.select to silence RN Web deprecation warnings.
(Optional) Guard expo-notifications token listener with Platform.OS check to avoid web warning.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py cleanly excludes _id and data_base64 from GET /api/vault via projection — correct.
urgency_note only attached to first right_now task for religions that define it (muslim). Verified working for police-report when unexpected=true+muslim.
No invalid legacy numbers (1912/1099/1077/1800111xxx) present in checklist or contacts responses.
OTP verify is a fixed mock accepting only '123456' — clearly labelled and safe for demo.
seed_data_creation: One TEST_aadhaar.jpg doc uploaded to vault under an ephemeral session_id during test (no cleanup needed — mock session).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend URL: https://sacred-send.preview.emergentagent.com. Fixed OTP: 123456. Run: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_emergency_planner.py -v. Frontend flow verified: Landing → Location → Place(+unexpected) → Religion → Checklist → Task detail. Session state uses AsyncStorage (localStorage on web) so 'Continue where I left off' only appears in the same browser context.
rca_of_issue: N/A — all 11 previously-reported issues have been fixed and verified in this iteration.
